response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems programming aptitude, but no evidence of routing tile optimization, real-time traffic integration, or fault-tolerant geospatial data systems.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience with GISCollective (open-source map data platform)
Strong systems programming background using DLang and low-latency async systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or navigation systems
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems work for routing tile pipelines or data consistency at scale
No mention of geospatial data formats (e.g., OSM, Protobuf tiles), routing algorithms, or latency optimization
